text: I wake up at six every morning and start my day with a glass of water and a quick jog in the park. Then I have a simple breakfast, usually oatmeal with fruit. My work begins at nine, and I spend the day focusing on tasks until a lunch break around noon. In the afternoon, I often take a short walk to stay energized. After work, I exercise for thirty minutes—sometimes yoga or light weights. Evenings are for cooking dinner, reading, or watching a show before bed. I’m in bed by ten. This routine helps me stay healthy and productive every day.
